criminal_law.title: Criminal intimidation
criminal_law.summary: Whoever commits criminal intimidation shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both. If threat is to cause death or grievous hurt, imprisonment up to 7 years or fine or both.
criminal_law.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both; if threat to cause death/grievous hurt: up to 7 years or fine or both
criminal_law.bailable: Yes (first part); No (if threat to cause death/grievous hurt)

criminal_law.title: Voluntarily causing hurt
criminal_law.summary: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 1000 or both.
criminal_law.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 1000 or both

criminal_law.title: Theft
criminal_law.summary: Whoever commits theft shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or with fine or both.
criminal_law.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both

criminal_law.title: Cheating
criminal_law.summary: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces delivery of property shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and shall also be liable to fine.
criminal_law.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine

criminal_law.title: FIR - Information in cognizable offences
criminal_law.summary: Every information relating to commission of a cognizable offence shall be recorded by the officer in charge of a police station. Refusal to record is illegal.

criminal_law.title: Investigation by police
criminal_law.summary: Any officer in charge of a police station may investigate any cognizable case without the order of a Magistrate.

consumer_protection.title: Definition of consumer
consumer_protection.summary: Consumer means any person who buys any goods or avails any service for consideration. Includes use of goods/services with approval of buyer.

consumer_protection.title: Deficiency in service
consumer_protection.summary: Deficiency means any fault, imperfection, shortcoming or inadequacy in the quality, nature or manner of performance of a service.

consumer_protection.title: Jurisdiction of District Commission
consumer_protection.summary: District Commission shall have jurisdiction to entertain complaints where value of goods/services and compensation claimed is up to Rs 1 crore.

consumer_protection.title: Complaint to District Commission
consumer_protection.summary: A complaint may be filed in writing with the District Commission. Can be filed by consumer or any voluntary consumer association.

consumer_protection.title: Penalty for non-compliance
consumer_protection.summary: Whoever fails to comply with any order of the Commission may be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to Rs 1 lakh or both.
consumer_protection.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to Rs 1 lakh or both
